name: B&G Martin Faux Leather Poly Fill Cushion Insert Dog & Cat Bed
description: Your furbaby deserves to be pampered and the B&G Martin Faux Leather Poly Fill Cushion Insert Dog & Cat Bed makes that su-paw easy. This pet bed is 100% vegan and cruelty-free, paw-fect for any animal lover and their best friend. The faux leather cover provides a luxurious feel and fits into most home décor––it will beautifully complement other leather furniture in your home. A polyfill cushion insert helps to keep your furbaby comfortable while catching some Z’s. Just wipe down the bed for easy cleaning.
